Interface IItemTemplate2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an item template.

[Guid("63215C2B-86B2-4B41-84FB-50283CAD0A7A")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IItemTemplate2 : IItemTemplate

Properties

Enabled 

bool Enabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

GeoTransformationHelper

The geographic tranformation helper object, set by the calling application, that enables the item template to install geotransformation method in to the system's GeoTransformationOperationSet.

IGeoTransformationHelper GeoTransformationHelper { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeoTransformationHelper

Examples

Sample Snippet

IntersectFootprints 

bool IntersectFootprints { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IsEnhancementEnabled

Indicates whether the item template will enhance datasets.

bool IsEnhancementEnabled { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsSensorTemplate

Indicates whether the item template can be used to build sensor data sources (as opposed to regular raster data sources).

bool IsSensorTemplate { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

string Name { get; set; }

string

string OutputDatasetTag { get; set; }

string

string

RasterFunctionTemplate 

IRasterFunctionTemplate RasterFunctionTemplate { get; set; }

IRasterFunctionTemplate

SupportsEnhancement

Indicates whether the item template contains functions that enhance a dataset.

bool SupportsEnhancement { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

Methods

AddAncillaryDataset(string, string, string)

Adds additional outgoing tags for non-primary datasets that can be built using this item template. This method also accepts an optional name of a template function that resides within the primary raster function template associated within this item template wh

void AddAncillaryDataset(string sOutputDatasetTag, string sFunctionTemplateName, string sPrimaryChainConnectorVariable)

Parameters

sOutputDatasetTag string
sFunctionTemplateName string
sPrimaryChainConnectorVariable string

Sample Snippet

EnableEnhancement(bool)

Enable or disable functions that enhance a dataset.

Parameters

bEnableEnhancement bool
